                deps.update(await initialize_langchain_llm())

# Utilities that LangChain tools depend on (pattern tracker, recovery engine, etc.)
                deps.update(await initialize_langchain_utils())
                
                # Initialize LangChain tools that depend on multiple client types
                deps.update(await self._initialize_langchain_tools())

for cleanup_func, domain in [
                    (cleanup_slack_clients, "Slack"),
                    (cleanup_integration_clients, "Integration"),  # NEW
                    (cleanup_langchain_utils, "LangChain Utils"),  # NEW
                    (cleanup_langchain_llm, "LangChain LLM"),  # NEW
                    (cleanup_db_clients, "DB"),
                    (cleanup_ai_clients, "AI"),
                    (cleanup_cloud_clients, "Cloud"),
                ]:

async def _initialize_langchain_tools(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Initialize LangChain tools that depend on multiple client types."""
        logger.info("Initializing LangChain tools")
        
        tools = {}
        
        # Initialize slack_tool
        logger.info("Creating SlackTool (raw)")
        msg_ops = get_instance("msg_ops")
        info_ops = get_instance("info_ops")
        slack_tool_raw = SlackTool(msg_ops=msg_ops, info_ops=info_ops)

        # Wrap the raw SlackTool with intelligent failure-tracking wrapper
        logger.info("Wrapping SlackTool with IntelligentSlackToolWrapper")
        slack_tool = IntelligentSlackToolWrapper(slack_tool=slack_tool_raw)

        set_instance("slack_tool", slack_tool)
        tools["slack_tool"] = slack_tool
        
        
        # Initialize incident_analyzer
        logger.info("Creating IncidentAnalyzer")
        jira_tool = get_instance("jira_mcp_tool")
        openai_handler = get_instance("openai")
        metrics_collector = get_instance("local_metrics_collector")
        # Retrieve the default LangChain LLM (injected earlier via langchain_llm_factory)
        llm = get_instance("langchain_llm_default")
        incident_analyzer = IncidentAnalyzer(
            jira_tool=jira_tool,
            slack_tool=slack_tool,
            openai_handler=openai_handler,
            metrics_collector=metrics_collector,
            llm=llm
        )
        set_instance("incident_analyzer", incident_analyzer)
        tools["incident_analyzer"] = incident_analyzer
        
        # Initialize message_analyzer
        logger.info("Creating MessageAnalyzer")
        secrets_manager = get_instance("secrets_manager")
        message_analyzer = MessageAnalyzer(
            openai_handler=openai_handler,
            secrets_manager=secrets_manager
        )
        set_instance("message_analyzer", message_analyzer)
        tools["message_analyzer"] = message_analyzer
        
        
        logger.info("LangChain tools initialized successfully")
        return tools

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '.')

# Test that key files can be imported without incident_analyzer references
try:
    print('Testing imports after incident_analyzer cleanup...')
    
    # Test DI container import
    from packages.core.di_container import DIContainer
    print('✅ DIContainer import successful')
    
    # Test query command import  
    from packages.slack.command_processing.query_command import SlackQueryHandler
    print('✅ SlackQueryHandler import successful')
    
    # Test dependency setup import
    from packages.slack.channel_events.request_processing.dependency_setup import setup_dependencies
    print('✅ dependency_setup import successful')
    
    # Test integration factory import
    from packages.core.client_factory.integration_factory import initialize_integration_clients
    print('✅ integration_factory import successful')
    
    # Verify no incident_analyzer attributes in SlackQueryHandler
    handler_attrs = dir(SlackQueryHandler)
    has_incident_analyzer = any('incident_analyzer' in attr.lower() for attr in handler_attrs)
    if has_incident_analyzer:
        print('❌ Found incident_analyzer references in SlackQueryHandler')
        sys.exit(1)
    else:
        print('✅ No incident_analyzer references in SlackQueryHandler')
    
    print('\\n🎉 ALL VERIFICATION TESTS PASSED!')
    print('✅ incident_analyzer cleanup successful')
    print('✅ All imports working correctly')
    print('✅ No broken references found')
    
except ImportError as e:
    print(f'❌ Import error: {e}')
    sys.exit(1)
except Exception as e:
    print(f'❌ Unexpected error: {e}')
    sys.exit(1)
"

print('Testing imports after incident_analyzer cleanup with venv...')

try:

    print('✅ DIContainer import successful')
    
    from packages.slack.command_processing.query_command import SlackQueryHandler
    print('✅ SlackQueryHandler import successful')
    
    # Verify no incident_analyzer in SlackQueryHandler
    handler = SlackQueryHandler.__new__(SlackQueryHandler)
    handler_attrs = dir(handler)
    has_incident_analyzer = any('incident_analyzer' in attr.lower() for attr in handler_attrs)
    if has_incident_analyzer:
        print('❌ Found incident_analyzer references')
        sys.exit(1)
    else:
        print('✅ No incident_analyzer references in SlackQueryHandler')
    
    print('\\n🎉 INCIDENT_ANALYZER CLEANUP VERIFICATION PASSED!')
    
except Exception as e:
    print(f'❌ Error: {e}')
    sys.exit(1)
"
